translations.text: I have chosen you, so listen to what is being revealed.

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّنِيٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعۡبُدۡنِي وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكۡرِيٓ ١٤
text_uthmani: إِنَّنِىٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدْنِى وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكْرِىٓ

translations.text: I am God; there is no god but Me. So worship Me and keep up the prayer so that you remember Me.

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخۡفِيهَا لِتُجۡزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفۡسِۭ بِمَا تَسۡعَىٰ ١٥
text_uthmani: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ

translations.text: The Hour is coming––though I choose to keep it hidden––for each soul to be rewarded for its labour.

text_qpc_hafs: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنۡهَا مَن لَّا يُؤۡمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرۡدَىٰ ١٦
text_uthmani: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنْهَا مَن لَّا يُؤْمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرْدَىٰ

translations.text: Do not let anyone who does not believe in it and follows his own desires distract you from it, and so bring you to ruin.’
‘Moses, what is that in your right hand?’

text_qpc_hafs: قَالَ هِيَ عَصَايَ أَتَوَكَّؤُاْ عَلَيۡهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِي وَلِيَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخۡرَىٰ ١٨
text_uthmani: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ

translations.text: ‘It is my staff,’ he said, ‘I lean on it; restrain my sheep with it; I also have other uses for it.’
God said, ‘Throw it down, Moses.’
He threw it down and- lo and behold!- it became a fast-moving snake.

text_qpc_hafs: قَالَ خُذۡهَا وَلَا تَخَفۡۖ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ ٢١
text_uthmani: قَالَ خُذْهَا وَلَا تَخَفْ ۖ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ

translations.text: He said, ‘Pick it up without fear: We shall turn it back into its former state.

text_qpc_hafs: وَٱضۡمُمۡ يَدَكَ إِلَىٰ جَنَاحِكَ تَخۡرُجۡ بَيۡضَآءَ مِنۡ غَيۡرِ سُوٓءٍ ءَايَةً أُخۡرَىٰ ٢٢
text_uthmani: وَٱضْمُمْ يَدَكَ إِلَىٰ جَنَاحِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ ءَايَةً أُخْرَىٰ

translations.text: Now place your hand under your armpit and it will come out white, though unharmed: that is another sign.
We do this to show you some of Our greatest signs.
Go to Pharaoh, for he has truly become a tyrant.’
Moses said, ‘Lord, lift up my heart
and ease my task for me.
Untie my tongue,
so that they may understand my words,
and give me a helper from my family,
my brother Aaron-
augment my strength through him.
Let him share my task
so that we can glorify You much
and remember You often:
You are always watching over us.’
God said, ‘Moses, your request is granted.
Indeed We showed you favour before.
